assigned_task: Update local dashboard status feed draft from verified evidence only

answers.What already exists?: Agentic Nexus policy and machine-readable schemas exist under .agentic_nexus.
answers.What has already been started?: The diagnostic layer, authorisation policy, schema package, and validation report have been started and validated.
answers.Why was it created?: To stop agents receiving work without context, scope boundaries, evidence, and approval checks.
answers.What problem was it meant to solve?: Uncontrolled or unclear agent execution across the Unite-Group Nexus ecosystem.
answers.What friction is it trying to reduce?: Repeated explanations, duplicated work, weak evidence, and unsafe autonomous actions.
answers.What is missing?: Runtime validation before workers accept tasks.
answers.What is duplicated?: No duplicate runtime validator currently exists in this folder.
answers.What is unclear?: Future worker integration still needs a preflight wrapper.
answers.What benefits Unite-Group Nexus as a who: Creates a fail-closed gate before local workers execute tasks.
answers.What is the smallest useful next action?: Run validate_agent_session.py against the proposed worker session.

diagnostic_gate.next_action: Validate session and then update local dashboard status only.

requested_actions: update local dashboard status from verified evidence
